title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dove India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dove India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dove India South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dove India South Asia Partners:
Dove India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India South Asia Partners!
